heading: Imposition of sanctions with respect to persons who engage in censorship or other forms of repression in Syria
label: 8793 Imposition of sanctions with respect to persons who engage in censorship or other forms of repression in Syria
notes: Termination of SectionFor termination of section, see .section 8795 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The President shall impose sanctions described in with respect to each person on the list required by subsection (b).section 8791(c) of this title

children.heading: List of persons who engage in censorship
children.label: b List of persons who engage in censorship

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than 120 days after , the President shall submit to the appropriate congressional committees a list of persons that the President determines have engaged in censorship, or activities relating to censorship, in a manner that prohibits, limits, or penalizes the legitimate exercise of freedom of expression by citizens of Syria.August 10, 2012

children.label: A
children.text: not later than 300 days after , and every 180 days thereafter; andAugust 10, 2012

children.heading: Form
children.label: A Form
children.text: The list required by paragraph (1) shall be submitted in unclassified form but may contain a classified annex.

children.heading: Public availability
children.label: B Public availability
children.text: The unclassified portion of the list required by paragraph (1) shall be made available to the public and posted on the websites of the Department of the Treasury and the Department of State.
